item.title: Trump's Capital Conundrum
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Trump’s Capital Conundrum

In D.C., Trump’s gun plans were grand,
But divisions split his own band.
While troops parade proud,
Crime festers unbowed,
Crypto profits still fall in his hand.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • Trump’s D.C. Crime Crackdown Shows Administration’s Uneasy Relationship With Guns
  • Crime Festers in Republican States While Their Troops Patrol Washington
  • Trump Family Profits Even With Tepid Launch of Crypto Tokens

item.title: A Policy Dance and a Legal Prance
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

A Policy Dance and a Legal Prance

Susan Monarez stood her stance,
Against Kennedy’s vaccine dance.
Fired she was, with no legal cause,
While Cook shifts rules, giving polluters a chance.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • CDC Director Susan Monarez Is Fired, White House Says
  • Steven Cook, a Former Chemical Industry Lawyer, Now at E.P.A., Wants to Change PFAS Rules

item.title: A.I. and Tariff Tango
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

A.I. and Tariff Tango

In tech, they’ve invested a ton,
Data centers help the economy run.
But Trump’s latest act,
Doubles tariffs, that’s fact,
So India’s trade deals are undone.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • The A.I. Spending Frenzy Is Propping Up the Real Economy, Too
  • Trump Raises Tariffs on India to 50% Over Russian Oil

item.title: Cook's Battle at the Fed
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Cook’s Battle at the Fed

There once was a Fed board named Cook,
Whom Trump, with no cause, overtook.
But she wouldn’t resign,
Said, “This job is mine!”
As the headlines, her story, forsook.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • Trump Says He Is Firing Lisa Cook From Fed Board of Governors
  • Lisa Cook Says She Will Not Step Down From the Fed Board
  • Lisa Cook Broke Ground at the Fed, Before Attack by Trump

item.title: Disaster and Defense in D.C.
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Disaster and Defense in D.C.

In D.C., the Guard now bears arms,
While FEMA’s in gutting alarms.
Trump’s policies shift,
Disasters might drift,
And global warming raises alarms.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • FEMA Employees Warn That Trump Is Gutting Disaster Response
  • National Guard Patrols Begin to Carry Weapons in D.C.
  • Trump Relies on Personal Diplomacy With Putin. The Result Is a Strategic Muddle.

item.title: Capitols and Conflicts
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Capitols and Conflicts

On Jan. 6, chaos once reigned,
Prosecutors were fired, some chained.
In Donbas, they fight,
For peace talks ignite,
While sanctions on Russia remain strained.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • Reframing Jan. 6: After the Pardons, the Purge
  • Peace Talks in Ukraine All Lead to the Donbas
  • Why Haven’t Sanctions on Russia Stopped the War? The Money Is Still Flowing.

item.title: Trump's Corporate Quake
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Trump’s Corporate Quake

There once was a leader named Trump,
Who made market waves with a thump.
Intel, he did stake,
Causing quite the quake,
In politics, his moves were a bump.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • Corporate America’s Newest Activist Investor: Donald Trump
  • Intel Agrees to Sell U.S. a 10% Stake in Its Business

item.title: Trump's Economic Tango
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Trump’s Economic Tango

Trump’s grasp on the Fed’s like a game,
Jerome’s speech at Jackson won’t tame.
With jobs on the line,
And power in decline,
The economy’s caught in the flame.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • Taking on the Fed, Trump Combines Retribution Tactics With a Power Play
  • Trump’s Attacks on the Fed and BLS Threaten Key Source of Economic Strength
  • Jay Powell Takes Center Stage with Friday’s Jackson Hole Address
  • Year Will End With 300,000 Fewer Federal Workers, Trump Official Says

item.title: Economy and Strategies on the Rise
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Economy and Strategies on the Rise

At Jackson Hole, Powell did preach,
But Nvidia’s rise was the speech.
While tariffs caused fret,
Walmart’s sales were a bet,
And Trump’s plans for maps overreach.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • Behind Powell’s Big Gamble in Final Jackson Hole Speech
  • Investors Expect Nvidia’s Earnings to Move the S&P More Than Powell’s Speech
  • Walmart Sees Sales ‘Momentum’ Despite Tariffs
  • Texas House Approves Redistricting Maps, Just as Trump Wanted

item.title: A Party in Crisis, A President's Gambit
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

A Party in Crisis, A President’s Gambit

The Democrats’ numbers are thinning,
While Trump boasts of summits he’s winning.
Voter rolls shrink,
As redistrict lines think,
Leaving Dems with a challenge quite grinning.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • The Democratic Party’s Voter Registration Crisis
  • Where Democrats Lost on Voter Registration
  • For Trump, Flashy Summits Come First. Grunt Work Comes Next.
  • Texas Republicans Ready to Pass New Redistricting Maps, Just as Trump Wanted
